zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Elmore於1611年1月出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾維斯頓--阿文時，她的父親Thomas Elmore17歲，母親Mary Elmore21歲。她於1626年與Peter James在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾維斯頓--阿文結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1660年4月在美國維吉尼亞州露意莎露意莎享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Elmore于1611年1月出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾維斯頓--阿文时，她的父亲Thomas Elmore17岁，母亲Mary Elmore21岁。她于1626年与Peter James在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾維斯頓--阿文结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1660年4月在美国弗吉尼亚州露意莎露意莎享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Elmore
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Ailmer, from Old English Æthelmǣr, composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ and mǣre ‘famous’. Aylmer has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century.

variants.name: Elmer
meanings: English: habitational name from Elmer in Middleton (Sussex), probably named with Old English ǣl ‘eel’ + mere ‘pool’.
German: topographic name for someone living near elm trees, from Middle High German elm ‘elm tree’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Elmore was born in January 1611, in Weston-on-Avon, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Thomas Elmore, was 17 and her mother, Mary Elmore, was 21. She married Peter James in 1626, in Weston-on-Avon, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in April 1660, in Louisa, Louisa, Virginia, United States, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Elmore est née en janvier 1611, à Weston-on-Avon, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Elmore, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Mary Elmore, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Peter James en 1626, à Weston-on-Avon, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en avril 1660, à Louisa, Louisa, Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Elmore im Januar 1611 in Weston-on-Avon, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Elmore 17 und ihre Mutter Mary Elmore 21. Sie hat 1626 in Weston-on-Avon, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Peter James geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb im April 1660 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Louisa, Louisa, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten.

Lei sposato Peter James nel 1626, nel Weston-on-Avon, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. ko.lifeSummary: Mary Elmore(이)가 1611년 1월 영국 그루스스터실르 웨스토--아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Elmore(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Elmore(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1626년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 웨스토--아폰에서 Peter James(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1660년 4월 미국 버지니아 주 루이자 루이자에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Elmore родилась январь 1611 г. в местности вестон-он-авон, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Elmore было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elmore, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter James в 1626 г. в местности вестон-он-авон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла апрель 1660 г. в местности луиса, луиса, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 49 лет.
